note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 1.1 cm x 2.0 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 29% slough, 71% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — not improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Debridement consult ordered.
